description: A realistic landscape painting of large, ancient oak trees standing in a green meadow. The central oak is massive with a thick, gnarled trunk and wide-spreading branches covered in dense green foliage. Other oaks of similar age stand nearby, their canopies merging into a broad expanse of green. The grass beneath is bright and sunlit. The sky is pale and hazy. The painting is a meticulous study of the trees' form and texture, with careful attention to the patterns of bark, the mass of leaves, and the play of light through the canopy.
